channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 斯塔默称英国不会卷入“更广泛战争”
item.description: Prime minister indicates that Britain does not intend to heed Donald Trump’s call to help open Strait of Hormuz

item.title: pgtui：Postgres终端用户界面客户端发布
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/mbljtb/introducing_pgtui_postgres_tui_client">Comments</a></p>

item.title: 法国极左极右翼得势，主流政党陷困境
item.description: Awkward choices emerge for mainstream parties after the first round of mayoral elections.

item.title: 加拿大养老基金受私募股权低迷冲击
item.description: Rising interest rates bring prolonged downturn to the buyout industry

item.title: 乌克兰在金融前线的紧急战斗
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 迪拜机场遭无人机袭击，阿航调整航线
item.description: Flights from Manchester, Edinburgh and Dublin among those that returned to destinations on Monday

item.title: 印度医院ICU火灾致十人死亡
item.description: All the victims of the fire in Odisha state are patients, and 11 hospital staff are being treated for burns.

item.title: 企业雇佣失业青年将获政府补贴
item.description: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.

item.title: 美国团体如何在英国推动新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 2026年奥斯卡金像奖完整获奖名单
item.description: See the whole list of all the winners at the 98th Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences Awards held at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles

item.title: 下载：AI如何用于军事目标锁定及五角大楼对Claude的战争
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Defense official reveals how AI chatbots coul

item.title: 策略师称市场尚未经历“通缩性去泡沫”
item.description: Christopher Verrone, partner and chief market strategist at Strategas, examines market reaction to the Iran war and the policy response he expects from the Federal Reserve. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: 央行应对已颠覆市场的通胀忧虑
item.description: Policymakers from Fed, ECB, others meet for first time since war’s outbreak.

item.title: 美银Mensah：私募市场将迎“健康整顿”
item.description: Bernard Mensah, who leads Bank of America Corp.’s international operations, says signs of strain in parts of the private credit market present an opportunity for “a very good, healthy cleanup.” Speaki

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容纳入通胀衡量指标
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 奥尔塞尔竞购商银，为全面掌控裕信铺路
item.description: UniCredit SpA made a €35 billion ($40 billion) bid for Commerzbank AG designed to increase its shareholding beyond 30%, easing the path for a potential future acquisition despite fierce opposition fro

item.title: 钢铁厂日耗130万英镑运营
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 通胀忧虑升温 美债回吐2026年全部涨幅
item.description: The US Treasury market has erased all its gains for the year as the war-driven surge in oil prices sets investors panicking about both inflation and growth risks.

item.title: 保障数字资产抵御未来威胁
信实拟联合六家银行为Jio印度IPO护航
item.description: Reliance Industries Ltd. is working with half a dozen banks for the planned share sale of its telecom unit, Jio Platforms Ltd., with more advisers likely to be added soon, according to people familiar

item.title: 查拉梅遭调侃成奥斯卡被冷落焦点
item.description: Here's what happened inside the winners room and other insights from the biggest night in Hollywood.

item.title: 吹哨人指TikTok与Meta为算法竞赛罔顾安全
item.description: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

item.title: 散户从私募信贷金矿撤资数十亿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 调查：多数菲律宾女性认为女性应主内
item.description: The Philippines ranks among Asia’s most gender-equal societies by several international measures. Yet ask Filipino women where they truly belong and most will still tell you: at home. A new survey has

item.title: 香港高级警员否认性侵案中猥亵职员
item.description: A senior Hong Kong police officer has denied molesting a government clerk at the force’s headquarters more than a year ago. Senior Superintendent Ian Chow Ngai-kong, 50, on Monday stood trial at Easte

item.title: 瑞典扣押俄罗斯影子舰队船只船长
item.description: The skipper of the Sea Owl One is suspected of producing forged documents when it was boarded by coast guard.

item.title: 纸币、河狸与英国式反弹
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: 探究AI在某些游戏中受困的原因
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.
